items.name: Iron Sword
items.description: A sturdy iron sword. Reliable in a pinch.
items.lore: The kind of blade every first delver swears they will eventually replace.

items.name: Iron Axe
items.description: Heavy axe. Hits hard but slow.
items.lore: Forged for chopping wood. The dungeon disagreed on the intended use.

items.name: Shadow Dagger
items.description: A slender blade carved from shadow-glass. Strikes twice before they notice once.
items.lore: The edge is sharp enough to cut an apology short.

items.name: Warden Blade
items.description: The ancient sword of a Dungeon Warden. Devastating cleave.
items.lore: Those who carried it didn't argue about overtime.

items.name: Moonsteel Sword
items.description: A cold silver blade that keeps a clean edge.
items.lore: It reflects light even where no stars should reach.

items.name: Steel Pickaxe
items.description: A heavy steel pickaxe. Can mine ore and crack skulls.
items.lore: It was forged for quarry work, but the edge learned other duties underground.

items.name: Bronze Pickaxe
items.description: An old bronze pickaxe. Better days are behind it, but it still swings.
items.lore: Passed through too many hands to remember its first owner.

items.name: Iron Helmet
items.description: A basic iron helmet. Protects the most important part.
items.lore: Hammered flat enough to survive a goblin's optimism.

items.name: Leather Hood
items.description: A soft leather hood. Light and better than nothing.
items.lore: Standard issue for people who make bad decisions quietly.

items.name: Shadow Hood
items.description: Woven from shadow-cloth. Offers modest protection and a brooding aesthetic.
items.lore: Darkness is only threatening if you're not wearing it.

items.name: Warden Helm
items.description: Heavy helm of the dungeon wardens. Built to outlast the wearer.
items.lore: The visor is scratched on the inside. Make of that what you will.

items.name: Leather Chestplate
items.description: Stitched leather armor. Better than nothing.
items.lore: Smells faintly of oil, smoke, and someone else's bad decisions.

items.name: Iron Chestplate
items.description: Solid iron plate. Heavy but dependable.
items.lore: Every dent is a story. Most of them end well.

items.name: Arcane Robe
items.description: Enchanted robes that amplify the wearer's vitality.
items.lore: The embroidery still hums if you hold it to your ear at midnight.

items.name: Warden Plate
items.description: Heavy plate engraved with warding sigils.
items.lore: The old keep fell, but its oath still clings to the steel.

items.name: Health Potion
items.description: Restores 25 HP when consumed.
items.lore: Sweet, bitter, and suspiciously warm.

items.name: Greater Potion
items.description: Restores 50 HP when consumed.
items.lore: Twice the potion. Same bad taste.

items.name: Elixir of Life
items.description: Fully restores HP when consumed.
items.lore: The alchemist who made it vanished shortly after. Coincidence.

items.name: Lightning Strike
items.description: Calls down chain lightning to carve away half the current HP of nearby enemies.
items.lore: Old battlemages called it mercy because it always leaves something alive to regret the lesson.

items.name: Void Ball
items.description: Launches a drifting void orb that drags enemies into its path from far down the corridor.
items.lore: The sphere contains no darkness at all. Darkness implies that something remains to be seen.

items.name: Ring of Vitality
items.description: Absorb it to permanently gain +20 max HP.
items.lore: Warm to the touch. Something alive is sealed inside.

items.name: Ring of Power
items.description: Absorb it to permanently gain +4 Attack.
items.lore: The rune carved into the band has no translation. It only has results.

items.name: Ring of Swiftness
items.description: Absorb it to permanently gain +50 Move Speed.
items.lore: Lighter than air. The dungeon feels smaller with it gone.

items.name: Ring of Resistance
items.description: Absorb it to permanently gain +3 Defense.
items.lore: Each scratch on the band is a reminder of why it still exists.

items.name: Ring of Fortune
items.description: Absorb it to instantly gain +35 Gold.
items.lore: The merchant who sold it cried. Not from sadness.

items.name: Berserker Core
items.description: Your damage rises as your HP falls. Below 50% HP: +40% damage. Below 25% HP: +80% damage.

items.name: Storm Crown
items.description: Lightning Strike chains to 2 additional nearby enemies.

items.name: Shadow Step
items.description: Dashing leaves a shadow clone that deals 8 damage to nearby enemies.

items.name: Void Heart
items.description: Void Ball absorbs life: heal 3 HP for each enemy hit.

items.name: Death Ward
items.description: Once per floor, survive a killing blow with 1 HP.

items.name: Blood Pact
items.description: Each kill restores 4 HP. Overkill damage converts to bonus gold.

items.name: Doomshard
items.description: A blade forged from crystallized despair. Burns enemies on hit.

items.name: Void Edge
items.description: Tears through reality. Attacks pierce through enemies.

items.name: Voidplate
items.description: Forged from void material. Reflects 15% of damage taken.
